title: Deploy the Todo App - Knowledge Check
description: Confirm you understand how the app was deployed and exposed.

questions.title: How is the Todo app reachable at localhost:8080?
questions.content: After deployTodoWizardApp, the app UI is reachable in the browser. What makes that work?

options.text: It is registered behind the cluster's ingress controller
options.explanation: deployTodoApp deploys and registers the app behind ingress.

options.text: The app runs directly on the host, not in Kubernetes
options.explanation: It runs as pods in the todoapp namespace.
Dynatrace observes traffic, it does not route it.

questions.explanation: The app is exposed through the ingress controller installed in Section 01.
hints: Recall what conjureCluster installed alongside the cluster.

learningObjectives: Describe how a workload is deployed and exposed on the cluster.
